summary: Iteration 17 - Testing new features for Music Video Factory. All 23 backend tests passed. Code review verified all implementations. Features tested: (1) Backend textFont field in AssembleVideoRequest with default 'sans', (2) Font files mapped to Liberation fonts (Sans, Serif, Mono, Narrow), (3) Hooks distribution uses clip-aligned placement formula: round(i * (num_clips-1) / max(num_hooks-1, 1)), (4) MIN_HOOK_DURATION = 2.5 seconds, (5) /api/effects/list returns 20 effects, 3 transitions, 6 presets, (6) Frontend StepMediaLibrary has transition-select-{id} with 3 options (crossfade, cut, fade_black), (7) Frontend Step6AssembleVideo has font family buttons (sans, serif, mono, condensed), (8) AI Mode (Step5AnimateClips) is untouched - uses FAL.AI not FFmpeg effects.
passed_tests: Backend: Login works with test@example.com / test123456
Backend: GET /api/effects/list returns 200 with 20 effects
Backend: /api/effects/list has 3 transitions (crossfade, cut, fade_black)
Backend: /api/effects/list has 6 presets (cinematic, dynamic, smooth, energetic, vintage_film, dreamy)
Backend: API root endpoint returns 200
Algorithm: 3 hooks, 7 clips → assigned clips [0, 3, 6] (clip-aligned distribution)
Algorithm: 2 hooks, 5 clips → assigned clips [0, 4]
Algorithm: 4 hooks, 8 clips → assigned clips [0, 2, 5, 7]
Algorithm: 1 hook, 5 clips → assigned clips [0]
Algorithm: MIN_HOOK_DURATION = 2.5 seconds
Font: LiberationSans-Bold.ttf exists at /usr/share/fonts/truetype/liberation/
Font: LiberationSerif-Bold.ttf exists
Font: LiberationMono-Bold.ttf exists
Font: LiberationSansNarrow-Bold.ttf exists
Code Review: Backend AssembleVideoRequest has textFont field with default 'sans'
Code Review: Backend font_map uses Liberation fonts (Sans, Serif, Mono, Narrow)
Code Review: Backend MIN_HOOK_DURATION = 2.5 in server.py
Code Review: Backend clip-aligned distribution formula present
Code Review: Frontend StepMediaLibrary has transition-select-{id} data-testid
Code Review: Frontend StepMediaLibrary has 3 transition options (crossfade, cut, fade_black)
Code Review: Frontend Step6AssembleVideo has font family buttons (sans, serif, mono, condensed)
Code Review: Frontend Step6AssembleVideo sends textFont in assembly payload
Code Review: Frontend Step5AnimateClips (AI Mode) is untouched - uses FAL.AI, not FFmpeg effects
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are correctly implemented
Backend: textFont field added to AssembleVideoRequest with options: sans, serif, mono, condensed
Backend: Font files mapped to Liberation fonts at /usr/share/fonts/truetype/liberation/
Backend: Hooks distribution uses clip-aligned placement - formula: round(i * (num_clips-1) / max(num_hooks-1, 1))
Backend: MIN_HOOK_DURATION = 2.5 ensures each hook stays readable for at least 2.5 seconds
Frontend: StepMediaLibrary has per-item transition selector with data-testid='transition-select-{id}'
Frontend: Step6AssembleVideo has Font Family row with 4 buttons (Sans, Serif, Mono, Narrow)
Frontend: AI Mode (Step5AnimateClips) is completely untouched - only Library mode uses FFmpeg effects
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and projects
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 17 are verified: (1) textFont field in AssembleVideoRequest with 4 options (sans, serif, mono, condensed), (2) Liberation fonts mapped correctly, (3) Clip-aligned hooks distribution with formula round(i * (num_clips-1) / max(num_hooks-1, 1)), (4) MIN_HOOK_DURATION = 2.5s, (5) Per-item transition selector in StepMediaLibrary with data-testid='transition-select-{id}', (6) Font family buttons in Step6AssembleVideo with data-testid='text-font-{value}', (7) AI Mode untouched. Test project 69d1609e3dbd882c6ec76c2a has images for testing.

verified_features.feature_1_textfont_field: VERIFIED - AssembleVideoRequest has textFont: Optional[str] = 'sans' with options: sans, serif, mono, condensed
verified_features.feature_2_liberation_fonts: VERIFIED - Font files exist at /usr/share/fonts/truetype/liberation/ (Sans, Serif, Mono, Narrow)
verified_features.feature_3_clip_aligned_hooks: VERIFIED - Formula: round(i * (num_clips-1) / max(num_hooks-1, 1)) distributes hooks across specific clip indices
verified_features.feature_6_transition_selector: VERIFIED - StepMediaLibrary has transition-select-{id} with 3 options (crossfade, cut, fade_black)
verified_features.feature_7_font_family_selector: VERIFIED - Step6AssembleVideo has text-font-{value} buttons (sans, serif, mono, condensed)
verified_features.feature_8_ai_mode_untouched: VERIFIED - Step5AnimateClips uses FAL.AI, not FFmpeg effects
